CREATE TABLE test_md5 (input_string String, hash FixedString(16));
INSERT INTO test_md5 VALUES ('test'), ('example'), ('clickhouse'), ('MD5 hash function'), ('boundary conditions'), ('1234567890');
SELECT input_string, MD5(input_string) AS md5_hash FROM test_md5;
SELECT hex(MD5(input_string)) AS md5_hex FROM test_md5 WHERE input_string LIKE 'test%';
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT tj.id, MD5(tmd5.input_string) AS md5_hash FROM test_md5 AS tmd5 JOIN test_join AS tj ON tj.id = 1 WHERE tj.value = 'data1';
SELECT MD5(input_string) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_md5 WHERE input_string LIKE 'MD5%') AS filtered;
SELECT MD5(input_string) AS md5_hash FROM test_md5 WHERE input_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MD5('') AS empty_md5_hash, MD5(' ') AS space_md5_hash;
